channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: The New Denpa Men coming to Switch 2 on April 6
item.content:encoded:
• Switch 2

Enhanced visuals and a higher frame rate.

Genius Sonority will release a Switch 2 version of free-to-play RPG The New Denpa Men on April 6, the developer announced.

The New Denpa Men first launched for Switch on July 22, 2024, followed by iOS and Android on March 10, 2025. The Switch 2 version will support cross-platform play with the existing versions.

Some specifications will differ between the Switch version. They are as follows:

Differences from the Switch version

  • Smoother visuals thanks to a higher refresh rate.
  • Enhanced visual quality due to a higher resolution.

Please Note

  • Game Content: The gameplay experience is identical to the Switch version.
  • Device Usage: You can use the same save data across multiple devices linked to your Nintendo Account. However, please note that simultaneous play on more than one device is not supported.
  • Paid Items: In-game purchases are shared between the Switch and Switch 2 when using the same Nintendo Account.

Here is an overview of the game, via Genius Sonority:

About

Denpa Men, a mysterious creature that floats around radio waves.

Form a party with them and go on an adventure! The New Denpa Men is a free-to-play, consumer-operated RPG in which you catch the mysterious creatures Denpa Men that fly around you, make them your companions, and go on an adventure.

What are Denpa Men?

Denpa Men are mysterious creatures born from the radio waves that fly around you.

Each radio wave carries different information, so each Denpa Men is unique (one of a kind).

You can’t find them with the naked eye, but you can find and catch them using The New Denpa Men.

The New Denpa Men is an RPG in which you make them your companions and go on an adventure.

Let’s Go on an Adventure

Add the Denpa Men you want to go on an adventure with to your party.

Each Denpa Men has its own characteristics, and each stage you adventure on has its own characteristics, so we recommend that you form a party that suits the stage.

In addition to the main stage that you can enjoy at any time, there are also event stages that are open for a limited time and extra stages that open when certain conditions are met.

You may find treasure chests and secret passages during your adventure.

Monsters await you inside the stages.

Battles are quick and easy with simple controls (you can also give individual instructions).

There Are Many Other Elements Besides Adventure

In addition to RPG elements such as adventure and character development, there is also a wide range of content, including decoration elements for your own island and the island, fishing, battles with other players’ parties, “Together Catch” with up to four players playing nearby, and “Voucher Collection” to collect “Vouchers” dropped by monsters at the end of battle.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/the-new-denpa-men-coming-to-switch-2-on-april-6
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: MUSYNX: RETURN now available
item.content:encoded:
• PC

The independent rhythm game returns.

Rhythm game sequel MUSYNX: RETURN is now available for PC via Steam for a launch discount price of $16.99, publisher Wave Game and developer I-Inferno announced. The price will change to $19.99 after April 16.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

The beloved indie rhythm game MUSYNX returns! Back to classic gameplay roots—bringing you a pure rhythm gaming experience!

Key Features

  • The Indie Rhythm Game MUSYNX Returns! – Back to classic fundamentals, delivering a pure and authentic rhythm gameplay experience.
  • Classic Falling-Note Rhythm Mode – Featuring traditional four-lane and six-lane falling-note gameplay, combined with a clear and intuitive interface, allowing you to smoothly perform complex tracks and unleash the thrill of rhythm!
  • Authentic Instrument Key Feedback – Each note includes dedicated instrument sound effects, paired with low-latency audio technology. No more monotonous tick sounds—experience true musical performance.
  • Brand-New Two-Lane Mode: Easy to Start – Play with just two fingers and quickly enjoy the fun of rhythm tapping. Even beginners can easily step into the world of rhythm!
  • Continuously Expanding Music Library – 35 original tracks available at launch. At least 25 additional songs will be added via free downloadable content within the first six months.
  • Nine Difficulty Variations for Every Skill Level – Each track includes two-key / four-key / six-key layouts x three difficulty levels. Whether you’re a newcomer or a rhythm master, there’s always a chart for you.
  • Professional Accuracy Indicator & Performance Statistics – Adjustable timing feedback and detailed result analysis help dedicated players continuously push their limits.
  • Fast Access: Jump Straight into Gameplay – Enter a song in as fast as 10 seconds after launching the game. No waiting, just pure rhythm action!
  • High-Quality Visuals with 4K Support – A sleek science-fiction military-inspired visual design combined with 4K ultra-high-definition graphics delivers an immersive and premium visual experience.

(All audio content in this game is created without AI. Some visual assets were created using AI.)

Watch the launch trailer below.

Launch Trailer

English

Japanese

Korean

Traditional Chinese

Simplified Chinese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/musynx-return-now-available
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: GAME The Strongest Job Is Apparently Not a Hero or a Sage, but an Appraiser (Provisional)! ~Dungeon and Mystery Girl~ announced for PS5, PS4, Switch,
item.content:encoded:
Publisher SUNSOFT and developer Rocket Studio have announced GAME The Strongest Job Is Apparently Not a Hero or a Sage, but an Appraiser (Provisional)! ~Dungeon and Mystery Girl~, a fast-paced arena shooter adaptation of the anime The Strongest Job Is Apparently Not a Hero or a Sage, but an Appraiser (Provisional)! It will launch for PlayStation 5, PlayStation 4, Switch, and PC via Steam on April 23 worldwide.

Here is an overview of the game, via SUNSOFT:

About

A fast-paced arena shooter.

Dive into a fast-paced arena shooter where the controls are simple but the battles test your strategy!

Explore dungeons filled with summoners who unleash waves of enemies, relentless attackers, and the fearsome “Phantom” that hunts you down without mercy.

Level up to boost your stats and grab equipment from treasure chests to strengthen your character. With each upgrade offering random sets of three options, your character grows differently every time you play.

Choose three party members before entering the dungeon. Each combination changes your active and passive skills, dramatically altering your tactics.

Clear all the challenges in each stage and defeat the mighty boss lurking in the depths of the dungeon!

Game-Exclusive Story

Experience a brand-new, fully voiced adventure that branches off from the early events of The Strongest Job Is Apparently Not a Hero or a Sage, but an Appraiser (Provisional)!

After parting ways with Emalia, Hibiki takes on jobs to earn money together with Lillian, Claude, and Vene. The group sets out into a forest to collect materials for a quest—a forest where people have been mysteriously disappearing. Suddenly, they fall into a magical trap that whisks them away to a strange dungeon…

Will Hibiki and the others be able to escape from the dungeon? And who is the mysterious girl they encounter within its depths?

Watch the announcement trailer and first gameplay footage below. Visit the official website here: English / Japanese.

Announce Trailer

English

Japanese

Gameplay



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/game-the-strongest-job-is-apparently-not-a-hero-or-a-sage-but-an-appraiser-provisional-dungeon-and-mystery-girl-announced-for-ps5-ps4-switch-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Street Fighter 6 DLC character Ingrid teaser trailer
item.content:encoded:
Capcom has released the teaser trailer for Street Fighter 6 downloadable content character Ingrid, who is due out in late spring.

Street Fighter 6 is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, and PC via Steam.

Watch the trailer below.

DLC Character Ingrid Teaser Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/street-fighter-6-dlc-character-ingrid-teaser-trailer
